Cultivation Realms

Overview

On this page

山上修行 / Cultivation ​

Overview of the cultivation systems in Jian Lai. From Qi Refiners to Martial Artists, explore the paths to the apex.

Qi Refining System

The orthodox path of spiritual cultivation, spanning from Qi Refining to the Fourteenth Realm.

待完善→

Martial Arts System

The path of the pure martial artist, forging the body to shatter the void.

待完善→

Sword Cultivation

The most lethal of all paths, specializing in flying swords and sword intent.

待完善→
